summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FORGE AI v6 features: Activity log, Project files (Monaco+Yjs), Email mocking (Resend), WebSocket Yjs relay, Export with edited files. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All v6 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Activity logging correctly captures member.invited, member.role_changed, file.edited events with actor info and timestamps
Email mocking works gracefully when RESEND_API_KEY is not set - logs '[email mock]' instead of failing
Yjs WebSocket relay correctly authenticates via session cookie or ?token= query param, closes with 4401/4403 on bad auth
Export ZIP correctly includes edited files from project_files collection, overriding AI-generated blocks
Activity button correctly hidden for non-owners (viewers/editors)
StrictMode disabled in index.js to prevent WS double-mount issues - documented in comment

test_credentials.note: Test users cleaned up after testing

seed_data_creation: Created owner, collaborator (editor), and viewer test users via mongosh for role-based access testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v6 features fully tested: (1) Activity log: GET /projects/{id}/activity returns list sorted by created_at desc, accessible by owner/collab/viewer, 404 for non-members. Activity auto-logged for member.invited, member.role_changed, file.edited, message.sent. (2) Project files: PUT /projects/{id}/files creates/updates file with path, content, updated_at, updated_by_name. Returns 403 for viewers. GET /projects/{id}/files returns list. (3) Yjs WebSocket: /api/ws/yjs/{project_id}/{file_path} authenticates via cookie or ?token=, closes 4401/4403 on bad auth, broadcasts binary frames to peers. (4) Email mocking: When RESEND_API_KEY not set, _send_email logs '[email mock]' and returns {status:'mocked'}. (5) Export: ZIP includes edited files from project_files, overriding AI-generated blocks. (6) Frontend: Activity button (data-testid=activity-btn) owner-only, opens ActivityDialog showing events with icons/timestamps. WS status indicator shows 'live' with pulsing dot when connected, 'offline' with WifiOff icon when disconnected. Monaco editor mounts on Code tab with Yjs provider.

backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/export - includes edited files from project_files
WebSocket /api/ws/yjs/{id}/{path} - rejects bad auth with close code
Activity entries have required fields (activity_id, project_id, event_type, created_at)
Activity sorted by created_at descending (newest first)
Non-member trying to access activity gets 404
frontend: ActivityDialog shows activity entries with icons and timestamps
ActivityDialog shows event types: invited, role_changed, edited
WS status indicator [data-testid=ws-status] shows 'live' when connected
WS status indicator shows 'offline' with WifiOff icon when disconnected
Chat input disabled for viewers with 'Viewers are read-only.' placeholder
Share dialog shows per-member role dropdowns
Share dialog shows remove buttons for members
Monaco editor placeholder shows 'Awaiting instructions' when no files

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - When RESEND_API_KEY is not set, _send_email logs '[email mock]' and returns {status:'mocked'} without raising errors

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
